Rothesay 2nd Test — Henry Nicholls 121 and Rachin Ravindra 76 set up New Zealand's huge lead; Harry Brook hits England's quickest ever Test fifty from 33 balls
Middlesex 4th in County Championship Division 2 after six matches — Ryan Higgins leads with 28 wickets at 20.35 average
